caption: The video appears to be a presentation discussing a compliance resolution related to the Barnes and Noble Nook, which was released in December 2009. The Nook is based on an Android-derived platform, and its documentation stated that the source code would be available upon request. A request for the source code was made, but as indicated by the slide, there was a significant delay in receiving it, with the phrase "Time passes..." suggesting a prolonged wait. This implies that the presenter is highlighting an issue or challenge encountered during the process of obtaining the necessary source code, possibly due to bureaucratic delays or other unforeseen complications. The video likely continues to elaborate on the resolution of this issue and any steps taken to address the delay.
